summary: Internal Server Error on loading the shopping cart page
description: Users are encountering a 500 Internal Server Error when attempting to view their shopping cart. This issue appears to affect accounts that have existing items saved in their basket from a previous session.
expected_behavior: The shopping cart page should load successfully, display all saved items, and allow the user to proceed to checkout.
actual_behavior: The application crashes and displays a server error screen when navigating to the basket view.
steps_to_reproduce: Add one or more products to the shopping cart
Simulate a catalog change or wait for a background session update
Navigate to the cart page (/Basket/Index) and observe the application failure
additional_notes: The issue does not seem to occur on fresh accounts with empty baskets. It appears to trigger under specific data states for existing carts.
